creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
I have checked the "Install Kerberos authentication helpers" option in port's config, but I'm missing the ext_kerberos_ldap_group_acl heper, so I need to install it manually. This helper should really be installed when this option is set.

How-To-Repeat: Install www/squid32 port, try to use the squid ldap external group helper by the Markus Moeller.
